title: Minky Handy Hangers - Pack of 2, Space Saving Hangers For Closet, Wardrobe Storage Organiser, Closet Organizers and Storage
features: 5-SPACE HANGER - This cleverly designed hanger provides you with 5 sturdy spaces, allowing you to hang multiple garments in one place, giving you more room for your favourite clothes.
HANDY HANGER - Simplify your daily routine with this revolutionary hanger. Its unique design allows for effortless rotation, enabling a seamless transition from door to wardrobe in an instant.
FLIP OUT BRACKET - Designed with a convenient flip-out bracket, it can be effortlessly placed over any door, instantly transforming unused space into a functional storage solution.
ALL TYPES OF CLOTHING - Hang all your clothing essentials, from shirts and dresses to jackets and coats, with confidence knowing that they are securely supported by this reliable hanger.
DURABLE MATERIAL - Made to last for years, these hangers are crafted from strong and sturdy plastic that can withstand the weight of your heaviest garments.
description: The Minky Handy Hanger offers 10 sturdy hanging spaces, perfect to help keep clothes neat and tidy whilst ironing. With its lightweight design and flip out bracket, the handy hanger can easily be placed over a door enabling you to hang your clothes immediately after ironing, without the need to look for multiple hangers. Each hanger offers 5 sturdy spaces, once full, the unique design can be rotated to enable a smooth transfer from door to wardrobe in an instant!
